expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the holdout focus: "Promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature" and further defines it as Phase 7 promotion/finalization contract (approval gating, archive existing final, promote best draft, write finalization record/summary).

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: result.md declares "Primary phase under test: holdout" and scopes evidence to "Holdout bundle only" (only the two fixture JSONs). execution_notes.md also says: "The output is intentionally scoped to the holdout checkpoint" and the produced artifact is "holdout-phase aligned regression assessment".
